tool_uses.name: Agent
tool_uses.input:
{"subagent_type": "Explore", "description": "Explore Rust crate purposes", "prompt": "For each of these 9 Rust crates, read the Cargo.toml and the main entry point (lib.rs or main.rs) to summarize what each crate does in 1-2 sentences. The crates are at:

rust/crates/api/
rust/crates/commands/
rust/crates/compat-harness/
rust/crates/mock-anthropic-service/
rust/crates/plugins/
rust/crates/runtime/
rust/crates/rusty-claude-cli/
rust/crates/telemetry/
rust/crates/tools/

Report the crate name, its dependencies (from Cargo.toml), and a brief purpose summary. Be concise — under 200 words total."}
